title: Velvety Molcajete Irish Tomato Crumble
description: A comforting blend of jammy simmered tomatoes seasoned with Irish herbs and topped with a savory, buttery oat crumble.

ingredients.name: Irish butter
ingredients.notes: cold and cubed, or plant-based substitute

instructions: Preheat your oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Place the chopped tomatoes and onions into a large saucepan over medium heat.
Simmer the tomato mixture with the brown sugar and thyme for fifteen minutes until jammy.
Transfer the thickened tomato mixture into a seasoned molcajete or stone bowl.
In a separate bowl, rub the cold butter into the oats and flour until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Spread the oat crumble evenly over the top of the tomato base in the molcajete.
Place the molcajete on a baking sheet to catch any drips.
Bake for twenty minutes until the topping is golden brown and the edges are bubbling.
Allow the dish to rest for five minutes before serving to the children.
